ABOUT US
Careers
Kanata Honda | About Us | Careers

At Kanata Honda, we’re more than just a dealership—we’re a team of passionate professionals dedicated to delivering exceptional customer experiences every day. Whether in sales, service, parts, or administration, every role plays a part in keeping our customers on the road with confidence.

If you’re looking to build a rewarding career in a fast-paced, supportive environment, you’ve come to the right place.

Why Work With Us?

At Kanata Honda, we believe great people are the key to our success. We’re proud to offer:

A supportive team culture built on respect and collaboration
Opportunities for growth and advancement within the automotive industry
Ongoing training and development to help you succeed
Competitive compensation and benefits
A modern, professional work environment

Whether you’re just starting out or bringing years of experience, we’re committed to helping you reach your full potential.

Current Opportunities

At this time, we do not have any open positions.

We regularly update this page with new opportunities across our dealership, including roles in:

Sales & Product Specialists
Automotive Service Technicians
Service Advisors
Parts & Accessories
Administration & Customer Support

We encourage you to check back soon as our hiring needs evolve.
